scripts.build:wasm: rm -rf ../audio-circlelyzer-wasm/pkg && cd ../audio-circlelyzer-wasm && wasm-pack build --target web --release && cd ../audio-circlelyzer-app && npm run copy:wasm
scripts.copy:wasm: rm -f src/assets/wasm/*.js src/assets/wasm/*.wasm src/assets/wasm/*.d.ts src/assets/wasm/package.json public/*circlelyzer_wasm*.js public/*circlelyzer_wasm*.wasm public/*circlelyzer_wasm*.d.ts public/package.json && cp ../audio-circlelyzer-wasm/pkg/audio_circlelyzer_wasm* src/assets/wasm/ && cp ../audio-circlelyzer-wasm/pkg/audio_circlelyzer_wasm* public/ && if [ -f ../audio-circlelyzer-wasm/pkg/package.json ]; then cp ../audio-circlelyzer-wasm/pkg/package.json src/assets/wasm/ && cp ../audio-circlelyzer-wasm/pkg/package.json public/; fi
